programmes.show_description: Only two days after buying a used car, the new owner says the brake pads fell off when he put it in reverse; he is sued for the unpaid balance. S18, Ep243
Alleged drug use, restraining orders and stolen property are disputed when ex-roommates sue each other. S18, Ep244
A woman sues a married couple for the return of money for a used car they sold to her; a phone with text evidence is allegedly destroyed. S18, Ep245
A man admits he is delinquent on his property taxes but claims that has nothing to do with water damage allegedly caused by his commercial neighbour. S22, Ep82
A woman accused of racking up over 7K in charges on her boyfriend's debit card is also accused of fraud related to her 96-year-old grandmother. S22, Ep83
A man claims he was attacked by the repo man when his car was being towed; both men call the police on each other. S22, Ep84
An ongoing feud involving bad credit and an expensive car divides sisters; an unassuming friend comes along for the ride. S22, Ep85
A man saves thousands in a lock box to be given to his roommate after he dies; his sister's allegedly covert `opening? of the safe is called into question. S22, Ep86
A man says he was trying to stop a car from running him down by pounding on the hood of the oncoming vehicle. S22, Ep87
A woman sues her ex-boyfriend's mother for the return of money paid for a car; an alleged assault and child support come into play. S22, Ep88
A die-hard Lady Gaga fan confesses that he knew he was committing fraud when he wrote checks he knew would bounce; he is sued by a friend for a loan to attend a concert. S16, Ep45
Dawn Silvernail had a happy childhood. She is now serving time in prison, a convicted murderer. She fell into a relationship with a dangerous man who ordered her to kill. S2, Ep3
A kayaker is stuck with his head underwater and his friends have seconds to save him. S1, Ep13/15
The moment a bungee rope breaks and a British holidaymaker falls head first into water S1, Ep14/15
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A woman is hospitalized for a month after being repeatedly stabbed during a heated argument with her ex-girlfriend's sister. S22, Ep64
The Judge questions a pregnant woman's need to bring a concealed weapon to a meeting with her ex-girlfriend. S22, Ep65
While riding her scooter with a dog on either side, a woman claims the yapping of a neighbour's small Shihpoo caused her to fall. S22, Ep66
The Judge admonishes a young woman for sizing up a mechanic based on how nice he is; she sues him for allegedly substandard work, fraud and negligence. S22, Ep67
A woman claims she was forced to move out of her boyfriend's home because of the constant harassment by two of his ex-wives. S24, Ep181
When a man passes away, his family contests and nullifies his recent wedding and sues his partner for allegedly stolen property. S24, Ep182
A businessman is left holding a 36-month lease when his assistant returns to her native country; a friend steps in but is sued for alleged car damage. S24, Ep183
A landlord allegedly goes off on a frightened mother and child who quickly move out; the landlord claims they left lice and bedbugs behind. S24, Ep184
Though they admit they love each other, a mother and daughter bring their grievances over a car sale to court. S18, Ep246
A man battles with grief and debt when his older brother passes away suddenly; he's sued by an ex in-law for the unpaid balance on a four wheeler. S18, Ep247
Unwed parents fight over an alleged false arrest and destroyed property. S18, Ep248
A woman accuses a teenager of vandalizing her 'new' car; the teen claims she was home with her mother at the time of the incident. S22, Ep89
A woman claims her charity was forced to close after alleged internet defamation which caused the loss of over 3,000 donors. S22, Ep90
A man tries his hand at flipping cars only to end up suing the body shop owner he hired to fix an $800 non-running lemon. S22, Ep91
A man claims his friend constructively evicted him when she turned off the electricity; she says he acted entitled and disrespectful. S22, Ep92
Divorcees fight over the return of tools and the cost of their 17-year-old twins' sports activities. S22, Ep93
A woman hires a friend to sell an $8,000 Harley Davidson for her, but she says she never saw a penny once the deal was done. S22, Ep94
An independent hair stylist accuses her landlord of treating her like an employee rather than a renter. S22, Ep95
When a co-worker 'disrespects' his angry, broom-wielding fiancée, he beats him up; the Judge makes him pay for his foolish choice. S24, Ep197
All hell breaks loose at a custody exchange when a young man realises his alleged baby mama is cheating on him; he orders a paternity test. S24, Ep198
Jill Zimmerman sues former Geometry tutor David Kaspar, for the return of fees she paid him to tutor her daughter. S24, Ep199
A beer can hits a woman in the head, and she suffers a concussion; when she reunites with the boyfriend who supposedly threw the can, she is sued by an admirer for alleged loans. S16, Ep1
When Bennylyn Burke and her young daughter, Jellica, vanish after visiting a man she met online, police uncover a disturbing crime with international roots. S2, Ep1
Mark Martin boasted he wanted to become Nottingham's first serial killer - and he succeeded. After childhood, Martin spiralled into drug abuse and violent fantasies. S2, Ep2
Hot winds race down the mountains in Southern California spreading raging wildfires that claim the lives of six people. S3, Ep14
Following the discovery of his affair with a much younger woman, police Sergeant Stephen Jones killed his wife Madeline with his truncheon in their garage at home. S7, Ep2
Years after a murder in 1991, will determination and new forensic tools finally find Danielle Clause's killer? S5, Ep14

Ashley Humphrey shot dead Sandee Rozzo and claims she is brainwashed by her husband - Tracey Humphrey. At the time of the shooting, Tracey was facing prison for attacking Sandee. S2, Ep4
Series presented by Nick Knowles which shows the split-second moments when everyday events are transformed into disasters and meets the people who lived to tell the tale. S2, Ep1

With her five-year-old in the car, a woman is in hot pursuit of a vehicle she's determined to repossess; she winds up being arrested for breaching the peace. S22, Ep96
A man denies accusations that he was in prison but confesses that he never completed repairs after receiving money to do so. S22, Ep97
When a young woman is accused of stealing money from her mother's ex-boyfriend, she throws out wild allegations against him. S22, Ep98
When a rent-control tenant goes up against a large property owner and loses, he seeks damages from his allegedly illegal tenant. S22, Ep99
A German Shepard escapes a leash and attacks a woman and her small dog who claim they are scarred for life. S22, Ep100
Two men, over twenty years apart in age, fight over alleged loans after meeting on an internet dating site. S18, Ep249

Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S24, Ep187

A tragic miscarriage days before a Persian wedding, leads to a dispute between the grieving newlyweds and a disgruntled DJ. S18, Ep251
While campers are away motocross racing, an English Bulldog allegedly attacks a Maltese Poodle; their owners fight over vet bills. S18, Ep252
A mother's death, followed by the death of her daughter, leave family members fighting over the value of a car and the intentions of the deceased. S18, Ep253
Near Hamilton, Ontario, a jogger makes a gruesome discovery - the partially mummified remains of a human body. Using forensics, police are able to identify the body. S5, Ep1
A sniper targets abortion doctors and then disappears into the shadowy underground that protects him. When the sniper's mission moves to murder, a city is thrown into blind panic. S5, Ep2
A series of fires rip through California's San Joaquin Valley, killing four people. An investigation concludes that a serial arsonist may have started them. S5, Ep4
In the US, Lori Isenberg poisoned her husband but told authorities he had drowned, to cover up her fraud. She was eventually caught and pleaded guilty to second degree murder. S1, Ep2
Bryan Whitelock killed a friend and his brother, later murdered his neighbour Wendy Buckney, and was sentenced to life with no parole. S1, Ep3
In the US, Dr Milner's obsession led to the stalking of Tanya and Kenny. After court orders failed, he murdered Kenny and was sentenced to life in prison. S1, Ep4
